columns.column_name: Volume of disease - N (%) | High | Treatment
columns.extraction_plan: Extract the 'n' value from the 'Darolutamide (n = 497)' column header under the 'High Volume' section in Table 1 on page 5. The percentage is calculated as (497 / 651 total Darolutamide patients) * 100 = 76.3%.

columns.column_name: Volume of disease - N (%) | High | Control
columns.extraction_plan: Extract the 'n' value from the 'Placebo (n = 508)' column header under the 'High Volume' section in Table 1 on page 5. The percentage is calculated as (508 / 654 total Placebo patients) * 100 = 77.7%.

columns.column_name: Volume of disease - N (%) | Low | Control
columns.extraction_plan: Extract the 'n' value from the 'Placebo (n = 146)' column header under the 'Low Volume' section in Table 1 on page 5. The percentage is calculated as (146 / 654 total Placebo patients) * 100 = 22.3%.
